ab: Lawa, cyux su maki ngasal ga?
en: lawa, are you home?

ab: nyux, helaw gwah mzyup.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Lawa, cyux su maki ngsal ga?
en: lawa, are you home?

ab: ini kaki ngasal lawa ay! kun ga Ipay, maki nanu zywaw pi? kyalaw maku mwah Lawa.
ch: B:Lawa不在家耶!我是Ipay，有什麼事嗎?回來我會轉告Lawa。
en: lawa is not at home. I am Ipay. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: ima simu ga?
en: Who are you?

ab: yaki, sami ga Lawa ru Ciwas!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Lawa和Ciwas，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are lawa and ciwas, please open the door for us.

ab: ima sa ga?
en: Who is it?

ab: kun ga Watan, nyux saku mwah kangi Temu.
en: I am watan, I am here for temu.

ab: yaki nyux misu wahan mita la.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: bsiq balay ini su wah la, lungun misu balay.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Watan mwah saku mzuy isu la.
en: watan , I am here to play with you.

ab: hay wah qsahuy, nyux misu ngon bsiq balay.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: qani ga ngahi nuya saku, qaniq cikay!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: sbing balay ngahi qani.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: wah! qani ga nuya maku bway, qani cikay.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: sbing balay bway qani.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: tama cikay ha! qani ga nuya maku btasaw na qetun niqi cikay ktay!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: oh! sbing balay qetun qani.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: isu ga qaniq su yutak ga?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: kun ga ini saku qaniq yutak, maniq ku ring’go yasa la.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: qaniq su pyah ga?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: aw, smoya saku balay.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: anay misu sqilis bway ru pniqay su.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: mhuway su, bway qani ga, cingay balay boq nya.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: s’agan misu qsya pnbun misu.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: mhuway.
en: Thank you.

ab: cingay hazi maniq, cingay balay ramat hnapuy maku.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: uy! blaq balay sokan ru blaq niqun uzi.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: cingay hazi maniq, nyux cingay hazi qani na.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: iyat saku ksayux lay!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: cingay cikay qaniq, nyux cingay balay qani na.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: wan ku maniq cingay iyal la, iyat saku thoyay maniq lozi la.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
